query:
SELECT 
  pv.id, 
  pv.variantCode, 
  pv.variantName, 
  pv.productId,
  pv.status,
  pv.variantType,
  pv.isDefault,
  pv.customerId,
  pv.createdAt,
  p.sku as productSku,
  p.name as productName
FROM product_variants pv
LEFT JOIN products p ON pv.productId = p.id
WHERE pv.variantName = 'UI测试批次-双材料'
LIMIT 1;
